req.title: Reconciliation report (negative variant)
req.statement: The system shall produce a daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank; non-zero variance shall open an incident. Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits) must be tested.
preconditions: system job

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-075 requires: (1) a daily reconciliation report stored at EOD, (2) incidents opened whenever variance != 0, and (3) incident severity scaled by variance magnitude. Negative paths explicitly called out are insufficient_funds, unauthorised, and exceeded_limits. Test design covers: EP – balanced ledger (zero variance) as the positive partition; NEG – each named error pathway triggers an incident; BVA – variance at the exact zero/non-zero boundary (variance == 0 vs variance == 0.01); DT – multi-condition table mapping (variance present × error_code) to incident severity; STC – state transition from PENDING → RECONCILED → INCIDENT_OPEN to ensure job state machine is correct.

tests.name: test_reconcile_zero_variance_stores_report_no_incident
preconditions: banking-api is reachable
Internal ledger balance equals correspondent bank balance (zero variance)
No open reconciliation incidents exist for today
actions: Seed ledger and correspondent bank with matching balances via <seed_balanced_ledger_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid EOD trigger payload
Retrieve today's reconciliation report via <get_report_fixture>
expected: Report is stored with status RECONCILED
No incident record created for today's run
trace: R-FIN-075: non-zero variance SHALL open incident (converse: zero variance => no incident)
tests.executable:
import pytest
from helpers import api_client, seed_balanced_ledger, get_todays_report, get_incidents_for_run

def test_reconcile_zero_variance_stores_report_no_incident():
    seed_balanced_ledger(amount=10_000_00)  # <seed_balanced_ledger_fixture>

    resp = api_client.post("/cron/reconcile", json={"trigger": "EOD"})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    body = resp.json()
    run_id = body["run_id"]

    report = get_todays_report(run_id)  # <get_report_fixture>
    assert report["status"] == "RECONCILED"
    assert report["variance"] == 0

    incidents = get_incidents_for_run(run_id)  # <get_incidents_fixture>
    assert incidents == [], f"Expected no incidents, got {incidents}"

tests.name: test_reconcile_insufficient_funds_opens_incident
preconditions: banking-api is reachable
Internal ledger shows debit that correspondent bank rejected due to insufficient funds
Correspondent bank balance is lower than internal ledger by a non-zero amount
actions: Seed ledger with a pending debit that was rejected (insufficient_funds) via <seed_insufficient_funds_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid EOD trigger payload
Retrieve incident list for today's run via <get_incidents_fixture>
expected: Incident severity matches variance magnitude per severity matrix
trace: R-FIN-075: non-zero variance shall open an incident
R-FIN-075: incident severity based on variance
tests.executable:
import pytest
from helpers import api_client, seed_insufficient_funds, get_todays_report, get_incidents_for_run

def test_reconcile_insufficient_funds_opens_incident():
    variance_amount = 500_00  # cents
    seed_insufficient_funds(variance=variance_amount)  # <seed_insufficient_funds_fixture>

    resp = api_client.post("/cron/reconcile", json={"trigger": "EOD"})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    run_id = resp.json()["run_id"]
    report = get_todays_report(run_id)  # <get_report_fixture>
    assert report["status"] == "RECONCILED_WITH_VARIANCE"
    assert report["variance"] != 0

    incidents = get_incidents_for_run(run_id)  # <get_incidents_fixture>
    assert len(incidents) == 1
    inc = incidents[0]
    assert inc["error_code"] == "INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS"
    assert inc["severity"] in ("LOW", "MEDIUM", "HIGH", "CRITICAL")
    assert inc["status"] == "OPEN"

tests.name: test_reconcile_unauthorised_transaction_opens_incident
preconditions: banking-api is reachable
An unauthorised transaction exists in the internal ledger with no matching correspondent bank entry
actions: Seed ledger with an unauthorised transaction entry via <seed_unauthorised_txn_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid EOD trigger payload
Retrieve incident list for today's run
trace: R-FIN-075: non-zero variance shall open an incident
tests.executable:
import pytest
from helpers import api_client, seed_unauthorised_txn, get_todays_report, get_incidents_for_run

def test_reconcile_unauthorised_transaction_opens_incident():
    seed_unauthorised_txn(amount=1_200_00)  # <seed_unauthorised_txn_fixture>

    resp = api_client.post("/cron/reconcile", json={"trigger": "EOD"})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    run_id = resp.json()["run_id"]
    report = get_todays_report(run_id)  # <get_report_fixture>
    assert report["status"] == "RECONCILED_WITH_VARIANCE"
    assert report["variance"] != 0

    incidents = get_incidents_for_run(run_id)  # <get_incidents_fixture>
    error_codes = [i["error_code"] for i in incidents]
    assert "UNAUTHORISED" in error_codes
    for inc in incidents:
        if inc["error_code"] == "UNAUTHORISED":
            assert inc["status"] == "OPEN"

tests.name: test_reconcile_exceeded_limits_opens_incident
preconditions: banking-api is reachable
A transaction in the internal ledger exceeded the authorised transaction limit and was declined by the correspondent bank
actions: Seed ledger with a transaction that exceeds the limit via <seed_exceeded_limit_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid EOD trigger payload
Retrieve incident list for today's run
expected: Incident severity is proportional to variance
trace: R-FIN-075: non-zero variance shall open an incident
R-FIN-075: incident severity based on variance
tests.executable:
import pytest
from helpers import api_client, seed_exceeded_limit, get_todays_report, get_incidents_for_run, expected_severity

def test_reconcile_exceeded_limits_opens_incident():
    variance_amount = 50_000_00  # large variance => HIGH or CRITICAL
    seed_exceeded_limit(variance=variance_amount)  # <seed_exceeded_limit_fixture>

    resp = api_client.post("/cron/reconcile", json={"trigger": "EOD"})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    run_id = resp.json()["run_id"]
    report = get_todays_report(run_id)  # <get_report_fixture>
    assert report["variance"] != 0

    incidents = get_incidents_for_run(run_id)  # <get_incidents_fixture>
    exc_inc = [i for i in incidents if i["error_code"] == "EXCEEDED_LIMIT"]
    assert len(exc_inc) >= 1
    sev = exc_inc[0]["severity"]
    assert sev == expected_severity(variance_amount)  # <severity_matrix_helper>

tests.name: test_reconcile_variance_at_zero_boundary_no_incident
preconditions: banking-api is reachable
Internal ledger and correspondent bank differ by exactly 0 (boundary at zero)
actions: Seed ledger and correspondent bank with identical balances (variance == 0) via <seed_exact_zero_variance_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid EOD trigger payload
Assert no incident is created
expected: No incident opened (zero is the non-incident boundary)
trace: R-FIN-075: non-zero variance shall open an incident – boundary at variance == 0
BVA lower boundary: 0 is last value that must NOT trigger incident
tests.executable:
import pytest
from helpers import api_client, seed_exact_zero_variance, get_todays_report, get_incidents_for_run

def test_reconcile_variance_at_zero_boundary_no_incident():
    seed_exact_zero_variance()  # <seed_exact_zero_variance_fixture>

    resp = api_client.post("/cron/reconcile", json={"trigger": "EOD"})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    run_id = resp.json()["run_id"]
    report = get_todays_report(run_id)  # <get_report_fixture>
    assert report["variance"] == 0, f"Expected 0 variance, got {report['variance']}"

    incidents = get_incidents_for_run(run_id)  # <get_incidents_fixture>
    assert incidents == [], "Incident must NOT be opened when variance is exactly 0"

tests.name: test_reconcile_variance_one_cent_above_zero_opens_incident
preconditions: banking-api is reachable
Internal ledger and correspondent bank differ by exactly 1 cent (smallest non-zero variance)
actions: Seed ledger with a 1-cent variance via <seed_one_cent_variance_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid EOD trigger payload
Assert exactly one incident is opened
expected: Incident severity is the lowest tier (e.g. LOW) for minimal variance
trace: R-FIN-075: non-zero variance SHALL open an incident
BVA upper boundary: 1 cent is first value that MUST trigger incident
tests.executable:
import pytest
from helpers import api_client, seed_exact_variance, get_todays_report, get_incidents_for_run

def test_reconcile_variance_one_cent_above_zero_opens_incident():
    seed_exact_variance(cents=1)  # <seed_exact_variance_fixture>

    resp = api_client.post("/cron/reconcile", json={"trigger": "EOD"})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    run_id = resp.json()["run_id"]
    report = get_todays_report(run_id)  # <get_report_fixture>
    assert report["variance"] == 1, f"Expected 1 cent variance, got {report['variance']}"

    incidents = get_incidents_for_run(run_id)  # <get_incidents_fixture>
    assert len(incidents) == 1
    assert incidents[0]["severity"] == "LOW"
    assert incidents[0]["status"] == "OPEN"

tests.name: test_reconcile_job_state_transitions_pending_to_reconciled
preconditions: banking-api is reachable
No prior reconciliation job is running for today
Ledger is balanced (zero variance)
actions: Verify job state is IDLE before trigger via <get_job_state_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile to trigger the job
Poll job state until terminal via <poll_job_state_fixture>
Assert terminal state is RECONCILED
expected: Job transitions: IDLE -> PENDING -> RUNNING -> RECONCILED
trace: R-FIN-075: system job triggered by EOD trigger
STC: all valid state transitions must be traversed
tests.executable:
import pytest, time
from helpers import api_client, seed_balanced_ledger, get_job_state, poll_until

def test_reconcile_job_state_transitions_pending_to_reconciled():
    seed_balanced_ledger(amount=5_000_00)  # <seed_balanced_ledger_fixture>

    pre_state = get_job_state()  # <get_job_state_fixture>
    assert pre_state in ("IDLE", "COMPLETED"), f"Unexpected pre-state: {pre_state}"

    resp = api_client.post("/cron/reconcile", json={"trigger": "EOD"})
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    run_id = resp.json()["run_id"]

    observed = poll_until(  # <poll_job_state_fixture>
        run_id=run_id,
        terminal_states=("RECONCILED", "FAILED"),
        timeout_s=30
    )
    assert "PENDING" in observed or "RUNNING" in observed, "Expected intermediate states"
    assert observed[-1] == "RECONCILED", f"Terminal state was {observed[-1]}"

tests.name: test_reconcile_decision_table_severity_mapping
preconditions: banking-api is reachable
Severity matrix is defined: LOW < 1000, MEDIUM 1000-9999, HIGH 10000-99999, CRITICAL >= 100000 (cents)
actions: For each (variance, expected_severity) pair in the decision table, seed the appropriate variance
POST /cron/reconcile
Assert the opened incident carries the correct severity
trace: R-FIN-075: incident severity based on variance
DT: each condition combination maps to a distinct severity outcome
tests.executable:
import pytest
from helpers import api_client, seed_exact_variance, get_incidents_for_run, reset_ledger

@pytest.mark.parametrize("cents,exp_sev", [
    (999,    "LOW"),
    (1000,   "MEDIUM"),
    (99999,  "HIGH"),
    (100000, "CRITICAL"),
])
def test_reconcile_decision_table_severity_mapping(cents, exp_sev):
    reset_ledger()  # <reset_ledger_fixture> – ensure idempotency
    seed_exact_variance(cents=cents)  # <seed_exact_variance_fixture>

    resp = api_client.post("/cron/reconcile", json={"trigger": "EOD"})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    run_id = resp.json()["run_id"]
    incidents = get_incidents_for_run(run_id)  # <get_incidents_fixture>
    assert len(incidents) >= 1
    assert incidents[0]["severity"] == exp_sev, (
        f"Variance {cents} cents: expected {exp_sev}, got {incidents[0]['severity']}"
    )
